name: Eier in Gruner Sosse (Eggs in Green Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the mayonnaise, sour cream, and lemon juice until smooth.
2. Finely chop one hard-cooked egg and stir it into the sauce mixture.
3. Season with salt, pepper, and sugar.
4. Thoroughly rinse and dry the fresh herbs (such as dill, chives, parsley, tarragon, etc.), then chop them finely.
5. Blend the chopped herbs with the sauce until well combined.
6. Slice the remaining hard-cooked eggs in half.
7. Arrange the slices in the sauce and serve.
